_comment: Each release: bump WANDER_VERSION in main.py AND version here, then upload zips with: gh release upload current Wander-Desktop-mac.zip Wander-Windows.zip --repo faisal-nabulsi/wander-site --clobber (binaries are NOT committed to this repo).
notes: Recent-teleports history with one-tap undo, and a route-options picker in Two-Spot mode (preview 2–3 alternatives and pick the one you want). Plus the earlier record-replay, geofence auto-stop, and background scheduler.
